problem_statement.description: Clear, specific statement of the problem in 1-2 sentences

who_is_affected.description: The target audience or persona affected by this problem

frequency_signal.description: Evidence of how often this problem comes up (daily, weekly, one-time)

intensity_signal.description: How painful/desperate users are about this (urgent, annoying, nice-to-have)

evidence_links.description: URLs to sources where this problem was mentioned

existing_solutions.description: What users currently do to solve this problem

monetization_potential.description: How this could make money (subscription, one-time, usage-based, etc.)

confidence_score.description: Scout's confidence this is a real problem worth investigating
